title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript: state-vector, density-matrix AND stabilizer-tableau engines (Clifford circuits to 30 qubits), Kraus noise, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, Schmidt decomposition, error-correcting codes (bit/phase-flip, 9-qubit Shor, Steane [[7,1,3]] with live syndrome decoding), phase estimation, VQE with analytic parameter-shift gradients & QAOA, randomized benchmarking, OpenQASM export, and a 37-case self-test suite.
